_comment: 10 scripted memory-recall scenarios (TRD §16). seed_memories are pre-loaded against patient_id; queries should retrieve the listed expected_ids in their top-k.

seed_memories.content: Last visit was for a sprained ankle on 2026-04-12.

scenarios.query: Can I book something later in the day?
Just a reminder, I can't take penicillin

seed_memories.content: Patient drives 40 minutes from Lekki to reach the clinic.
Spouse Adaeze sometimes books on patient's behalf.

scenarios.query: My wife will book for me today
I'm calling about my blood sugar levels

seed_memories.content: Patient cancelled last 3 appointments at short notice.
Patient is on Cigna PPO insurance.

scenarios.query: Does my Cigna plan cover this?
I need to cancel tomorrow's visit

seed_memories.content: Patient has white-coat hypertension; readings spike on arrival.

scenarios.query: Can I see a woman doctor please?
My blood pressure was 160 over 95 when I arrived last time

seed_memories.content: Patient is hearing-impaired; please reply over WhatsApp not by call.

scenarios.query: What's the best way to reach me about results?
